Event: Clans Game
Event Date: 30/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: T235
Status Relic Totem

Once in a while, the unit reduces the spell power of 3 enemy units with the greatest spell power by 25% for 3 sec., frightens them for 3 sec., and deals 109375 pure damage to them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

- Level 20
Once in a while, the unit reduces the spell power of 3 enemy units with the greatest spell power by 30% for 4 sec., frightens them for 4 sec., and deals 218750 pure damage to them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

- Level 40
Once in a while, the unit reduces the spell power of 3 enemy units with the greatest spell power by 35% for 5 sec., frightens them for 5 sec., and deals 437500 pure damage to them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 90
